  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/organisation/realmCountryId/{realmCountryId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}

</MethodEndpoint>



API used to get the complete Organisation list for a RealmCountry

  id={"request"}

  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}

  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Returns the Organisation list","content":{"text/json":{}}},"403":{"description":"Returns a HttpStatus.FORBIDDEN if the User does not have access","content":{"text/json":{}}},"412":{"description":"Returns a HttpStatus.PRECONDITION_FAILED if the RealmCountryId specified does not exist","content":{"text/json":{}}},"500":{"description":"Internal error that prevented the retreival of Organisation list","content":{"text/json":{}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
